title: Output Guardrails Execution
interaction_flow: Runner → run_loop: run agent turn loop
run_loop → run_final_output_hooks(agent, hooks, context_wrapper, output): fire on_end hooks
run_output_guardrails → asyncio.as_completed(): await each task in completion order
run_single_output_guardrail → OutputGuardrail.run(agent, agent_output, context): invoke guardrail
OutputGuardrail.run → guardrail_function(context, agent, agent_output): call user function (sync or async)
OutputGuardrail.run → returns OutputGuardrailResult(guardrail, agent, agent_output, output: GuardrailFunctionOutput)
run_output_guardrails: if tripwire_triggered → cancel remaining tasks → _error_tracing.attach_error_to_current_span(SpanError) → raise OutputGuardrailTripwireTriggered(result)
run_output_guardrails: if all pass → return list[OutputGuardrailResult]
run_loop: on NextStepFinalOutput → call _finalize_streamed_final_output(streamed_result, agent, run_config, output, context_wrapper, save_items, items)
_run_output_guardrails_for_stream → await task: if OutputGuardrailTripwireTriggered → re-raise; if CancelledError → re-raise; if other Exception → log error, return []
run_loop (max turns exceeded): call run_final_output_hooks(..., validated_output)
run_loop → streamed_result.output_guardrail_results = results; streamed_result.final_output = validated_output; streamed_result.is_complete = True
_execute_tool_input_guardrails: if behavior.type == 'reject_content' → return rejection message (skip tool execution)
FunctionToolExecutor: if rejection message → return message without calling tool
FunctionToolExecutor: if no rejection → execute tool function (real_result)
_execute_tool_output_guardrails: if behavior.type == 'reject_content' → replace final_result with rejection message
key_relationships: OutputGuardrail.run depends_on guardrail_function (user-defined, sync or async)
_run_output_guardrails_for_stream wraps run_output_guardrails as asyncio task, stores ref in streamed_result._output_guardrails_task
run_loop (non-streaming) calls run_output_guardrails directly after NextStepFinalOutput
_execute_tool_input_guardrails runs serially (not parallel) for each tool guardrail
_execute_tool_output_guardrails runs serially (not parallel) for each tool guardrail
FunctionToolExecutor accumulates tool_input_guardrail_results and tool_output_guardrail_results across all tool calls
turn_resolution.execute_final_output_step returns SingleStepResult with output_guardrail_results=[] (agent-level output guardrails run separately in run_loop)

data_types.OutputGuardrailResult: { guardrail: OutputGuardrail, agent: Agent, agent_output: Any, output: GuardrailFunctionOutput }

exceptions.OutputGuardrailTripwireTriggered: Raised when agent-level output guardrail tripwire fires; carries OutputGuardrailResult
exceptions.ToolInputGuardrailTripwireTriggered: Raised when tool input guardrail uses raise_exception behavior
exceptions.ToolOutputGuardrailTripwireTriggered: Raised when tool output guardrail uses raise_exception behavior

important_notes: Agent-level output guardrails run only for the last/final agent in a chain (not on intermediate handoff agents)
Output guardrails run in parallel (asyncio.as_completed); first tripwire cancels remaining tasks immediately
Tool guardrails run serially per tool call; reject_content replaces output rather than raising exception
guardrail_source merging: agent.output_guardrails + run_config.output_guardrails (both are checked)
Tracing: each guardrail gets its own guardrail_span; tripwires also attach SpanError to current agent span
Streaming: _output_guardrails_task stored on RunResultStreaming; OutputGuardrailTripwireTriggered and CancelledError re-raised; other errors swallowed with logging
Tool guardrails only apply to function tools created with @function_tool; not to handoffs, hosted tools, or built-in tools
run_final_output_hooks (on_agent_end hooks) fire BEFORE output guardrails in both streaming and non-streaming paths
